title: KRS-One scopes correctly for parallel but blueprint forces sequential codex
description: KRS-One correctly scoped 3 parallel work streams (page-builder, component-builder, a11y-worker) but engine spawned them as subagent_type: code instead of kiln:codex. Blueprint step-5 forces sequential 1×codex+1×sphinx — no parallel codex pattern exists. Engine has no worker type validation. KRS-One assignment quality was high — boss is ready for parallel dispatch if infra supports it. Fix: (1) Blueprint needs N×(codex+sphinx) pattern; (2) Engine must validate worker types against blueprint whitelist.

title: Codex prompt skeleton compliance: 0/6 sections in M3 despite instructions
description: 0/6 skeleton sections present in M3 codex prompt despite instructions in codex.md. Instruction-based enforcement doesn't survive context pressure — model follows skeleton when context is fresh, ignores when deep in implementation. Fix: Structural enforcement via template file with section markers, or KRS-One embeds skeleton sections in XML assignment template so codex fills them in rather than generating from scratch. Hook could validate prompt structure before exec.

title: Engine context burn on resume: 21+ file reads before useful work
description: 21+ file reads before useful work on resume, ~100K tokens of reads. Engine re-reads everything: SKILL.md, brand.md, lore-engine.md, agents.json, step-definitions, blueprint, all reference docs, team protocol. Fix: 'Resume agent' pattern — foreground subagent does all reads, returns compact summary. Main session stays lean. Shares root cause with #7 (startup friction).

title: Teardown doesn't kill background workers
description: After engine 'tore down' 3 incorrect workers, they kept running. component-builder completed its entire assignment post-teardown. Platform limitation: TeamDelete refuses active members. Fix: May need kill-by-PID fallback, or explicit shutdown SendMessage to each worker before TeamDelete.

title: bun PATH missing — agents can't find non-standard binaries
description: bun: command not found — fell back to npx. Alpha Phase 2 should verify bun on PATH or add /home/dev/.bun/bin to PATH. AGENTS.md should document required PATH entries for non-standard binaries.

title: Codex bootstrap-before-inbox pattern (starts executing before receiving assignment)
description: After spawn, codex sends 'Bootstrap complete, ready for assignment' before processing KRS-One's assignment already in inbox. Default LLM behavior: bootstrap first, read inbox second. Wastes a round trip. Fix: Codex spawn prompt should say 'Your assignment is waiting. Process your inbox before bootstrapping.'

title: Engine startup friction: 8-10 turns on resume before any step work
description: 8-10 visible turns before banner on resume (vs 5 on fresh start). Same root cause as #3 — by M4-M5 the main session context is mostly bootstrap noise. Fix: Resume agent pattern or silent background bootstrap. Batch reads into single tool call.

title: shift+arrow nudge missing for interactive agents
description: Engine used to tell operator 'use shift+down to interact with Alpha.' Hint disappeared in v1.0.4/v1.0.5 rewrites. Fix: Re-add UX hint to interactive step spawn flow in SKILL.md.

title: Progressive MI6 synthesis not implemented
description: MI6 waits for all field agents → batch validate → synthesize. Research shows progressive processing yields 30%→80% success rate. Fix: MI6 processes findings as each agent reports. Selective routing of validated findings between agents (+9-21% accuracy). Cross-topic conflict resolution after all complete. Source: multi-agent-research-orchestration.json T3.1-T3.2, T6.1.

title: Hook 4 recurrence (n=2) — Rakim puts heading before status marker
description: Rakim puts heading before <!-- status: complete --> marker, blocking KRS-One dispatch. Root cause: Rakim knows the template but doesn't know *why* the marker must be line 1 (hook checks head -1 to gate dispatch). Observed in ST10 + ST11, different manifestations. KRS-One self-recovered both times (~45K tokens wasted). Fix: Explain mechanism in rakim.md: 'A hook checks head -1 to gate KRS-One dispatch — the status marker MUST be line 1.'

title: ST10 timeout (resolved — raised to 30 min)
description: Codex timeout was too short for complex builds. Raised default to 30 minutes.
resolution: Timeout raised to 30 min in config

title: Spinner verbs DOA (resolved — schema fix in 4cfae88)
description: Spinner verbs not displaying due to schema mismatch. Fixed in commit 4cfae88.

title: Boss goes idle after REQUEST_WORKERS — no WORKERS_SPAWNED confirmation
description: Boss goes idle after REQUEST_WORKERS — no wake-up when workers spawn. Needs manual nudge. Root cause: no WORKERS_SPAWNED confirmation message from engine to boss.

title: 1 correction cycle — artifact checks missing from runner.rs
description: Artifact validation checks were missing from runner.rs, caught by Argus during ST12. Required 1 correction cycle to fix.
resolution: Artifact checks added to runner.rs, caught by Argus
